title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following areas of scientific research, then decide which two should receive the greatest amount of public funding.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some areas of scientific research that could receive public funding.
Now decide which two areas of scientific research should receive the most public funding.
